definition.value: the natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of personal data; where the purposes and means of such processing are determined by Union or Member State law, the controller or the specific criteria for its nomination may be provided for by Union or Member State law;

classification_rationale: This paragraph provides a comprehensive definition for the regulatory term 'controller'.
anchor: ‘controller’ means the person or body determining purposes and means of processing, or provided for by Union or Member State law.

definition.value: any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes by which he or she, by a statement or by a clear affirmative action, signifies agreement to the processing of personal data relating to him or her

classification_rationale: This paragraph provides an explicit definition for the regulatory term 'consent' of the data subject.
anchor: ‘consent’ of the data subject means any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes

object.value: his or her personal data

condition.value: the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a condition under which the processing of personal data is permitted for controllers.
anchor: the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes

object.value: special categories of personal data

condition.value: the data subject has given explicit consent to the processing of those personal data for one or more specified purposes, except where Union or Member State law provide that the prohibition referred to in paragraph 1 may not be lifted by the data subject

classification_rationale: This clause provides a condition under which the prohibition on processing special categories of data does not apply, granting permission.
anchor: the data subject has given explicit consent to the processing of those personal data for one or more specified purposes

merged_exception_split.dropped_condition: where Union or Member State law provide that the prohibition referred to in paragraph 1 may not be lifted by the data subject

object.value: special categories of personal data

condition.value: processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) based on Union or Member State law which shall be proportionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a condition under which the processing of special categories of personal data is permitted, acting as an exception to a general prohibition.
anchor: processing is necessary for archiving purposes... based on Union or Member State law which shall be proportionate... and provide for suitable and specific measures
profile_gate_override: hc=False: Art 9(2) derogation outside the system's operative special-category basis — keyword present, not the basis; flagged for review

object.value: any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing

condition.value: in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language, in particular for any information addressed specifically to a child

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the controller regarding the manner of providing information and communication.
anchor: The controller shall take appropriate measures to provide any information... in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language

object.value: any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing

condition.value: in writing, or by other means, including, where appropriate, by electronic means

classification_rationale: This statement specifies the required format for providing information to the data subject.
anchor: The information shall be provided in writing, or by other means, including, where appropriate, by electronic means.

object.value: any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing

condition.value: When requested by the data subject, provided that the identity of the data subject is proven by other means

classification_rationale: This statement grants a conditional permission to the controller regarding the oral provision of information.
anchor: When requested by the data subject, the information may be provided orally, provided that the identity of the data subject is proven

object.value: the data subject to a decision based solely on automated processing

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes a data subject right, which corresponds to a DEONTIC obligation for the controller.
anchor: The data subject shall have the right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing
span_coverage_truncated: including profiling produces legal effects concerning similarly significantly affects

object.value: a record of processing activities

condition.value: an enterprise or an organisation employing fewer than 250 persons unless the processing it carries out is likely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects, the processing is not occasional, or the processing includes special categories of data as referred to in Article 9(1) or personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences referred to in Article 10

classification_rationale: This statement establishes a conditional exemption from record-keeping obligations for certain enterprises, making it a form of dispensation.
anchor: The obligations referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 shall not apply to an enterprise or an organisation employing fewer than 250 persons unless...

object.value: the personal data breach

condition.value: In the case of a personal data breach, without undue delay and, where feasible, not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it, to the supervisory authority competent in accordance with Article 55, unless the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the controller to notify a data breach.
anchor: the controller shall [...] notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

merged_exception_split.dropped_condition: the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

object.value: reasons for the delay

condition.value: Where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation to provide reasons for delayed notification.
anchor: Where the notification [...] is not made within 72 hours, it shall be accompanied by reasons for the delay.

object.value: an assessment of the impact of the envisaged processing operations on the protection of personal data

condition.value: Where a type of processing in particular using new technologies, and taking into account the nature, scope, context and purposes of the processing, is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons, prior to the processing

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the controller to conduct a data protection impact assessment under specific conditions.
anchor: the controller shall, prior to the processing, carry out an assessment of the impact of the envisaged processing operations

object.value: a set of similar processing operations that present similar high risks

classification_rationale: This statement grants the controller permission to conduct a single assessment for similar processing operations.
anchor: A single assessment may address a set of similar processing operations that present similar high risks.

object.value: High-risk AI systems

condition.value: in such a way, including with appropriate human-machine interface tools, that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons during the period in which they are in use

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the design and development of high-risk AI systems for human oversight.
anchor: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed... that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons

condition.value: in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a category of AI systems that are considered high-risk, subject to a condition on their permitted use.
anchor: Biometrics, in so far as their use is permitted under relevant Union or national law
profile_gate_override: hc=False: scope outside the system's operative high-risk basis — keyword present, not the basis; flagged for review

object.value: inaccurate personal data concerning him or her

condition.value: without undue delay

classification_rationale: This statement establishes a DEONTIC obligation for the controller corresponding to the data subject's right.
anchor: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller without undue delay the rectification of inaccurate personal data

object.value: incomplete personal data

condition.value: Taking into account the purposes of the processing, including by means of providing a supplementary statement

classification_rationale: This statement establishes a DEONTIC obligation for the controller corresponding to the data subject's right.
anchor: the data subject shall have the right to have incomplete personal data completed, including by means of providing a supplementary statement

object.value: personal data concerning him or her

condition.value: where one of the following grounds applies

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes a data subject right, which is classified as a correlative DEONTIC obligation for the controller.
anchor: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller the erasure of personal data concerning him or her

object.value: the provisions of paragraphs 1 and 2

condition.value: to the extent that processing is necessary

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes an exception to the obligations set out in paragraphs 1 and 2.
anchor: Paragraphs 1 and 2 shall not apply to the extent that processing is necessary

object.value: processing of personal data concerning him or her which is based on point (e) or (f) of Article 6(1), including profiling based on those provisions

condition.value: on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, at any time

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes a data subject's right to object to processing and the correlative controller's duty to cease processing.
anchor: The data subject shall have the right to object... to processing... based on point (e) or (f) of Article 6(1)

object.value: appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk

condition.value: Taking into account the state of the art, the costs of implementation and the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing as well as the risk of varying likelihood and severity for the rights and freedoms of natural persons

classification_rationale: This paragraph imposes an obligation on controllers and processors to implement appropriate security measures.
anchor: the controller and the processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk

object.value: the pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data

condition.value: Taking into account the state of the art, the costs of implementation and the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing as well as the risk of varying likelihood and severity for the rights and freedoms of natural persons, as appropriate, to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a technical measure that controllers and processors shall implement to ensure data security.
anchor: the pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data

object.value: the ongoing confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services

condition.value: Taking into account the state of the art, the costs of implementation and the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing as well as the risk of varying likelihood and severity for the rights and freedoms of natural persons

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a measure that controllers and processors are obliged to implement for data security.
anchor: the ability to ensure the ongoing confidentiality, integrity, availability and resilience of processing systems and services

object.value: the availability and access to personal data

condition.value: in a timely manner in the event of a physical or technical incident

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a required technical and organisational measure that controllers and processors shall implement.
anchor: the ability to restore the availability and access to personal data in a timely manner

object.value: a process for regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures for ensuring the security of the processing

condition.value: Taking into account the state of the art, the costs of implementation and the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing as well as the risk of varying likelihood and severity for the rights and freedoms of natural persons

classification_rationale: This paragraph specifies a required measure that controllers and processors shall implement to ensure processing security.
anchor: a process for regularly testing, assessing and evaluating the effectiveness of technical and organisational measures

object.value: the personal data breach

condition.value: When the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

classification_rationale: This paragraph imposes an obligation on the controller to communicate a personal data breach under specific conditions.
anchor: the controller shall communicate the personal data breach to the data subject without undue delay

object.value: the information

condition.value: where and insofar as the data subject already has the information

classification_rationale: This paragraph establishes an exception to the obligations set out in paragraphs 1, 2, and 3.
anchor: Paragraphs 1, 2 and 3 shall not apply where and insofar as the data subject already has the information.

condition.value: wholly or partly by automated means and to the processing other than by automated means of personal data which form part of a filing system

classification_rationale: This paragraph defines the material scope of the Regulation by specifying the types of personal data processing to which it applies.
anchor: This Regulation applies to the processing of personal data wholly or partly by automated means and to the processing other than by automated means of personal data which form part of a filing system

object.value: only processors providing sufficient guarantees to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures

condition.value: Where processing is to be carried out on behalf of a controller

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers regarding the selection criteria for processors.
anchor: the controller shall use only processors providing sufficient guarantees to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures
span_coverage_truncated: meet requirements regulation ensure protection rights

object.value: A risk management system

condition.value: in relation to high-risk AI systems

classification_rationale: This paragraph imposes an obligation to establish, implement, document, and maintain a risk management system.
anchor: A risk management system shall be established, implemented, documented and maintained in relation to high-risk AI systems.
